issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for installation and configuration failures.
The installation steps assume a Debian-based Linux environment and may not work on other operating systems.
The installation script is fetched via curl without verifying its checksum, which could allow tampering.

scenarios.name: composite-monitor-cpu-mem
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required curl POST, query, tags, notify_no_data, escalation_message, and renotify_interval, but lacks a warning threshold; Response A lacks most rubric items.

scenarios.name: ddtrace-instrumentation-flask
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets all rubric requirements, while Response B omits key configuration details and metric setting.
